com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXHarness

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConnectivityObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXHarness
extends IXConnectivityObject, IXWriteableObject
    Interface providing access to harness levels, attached bundles, connectors and wires of a harness. This interface only has relevance in Capital Integrator designs.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getActiveHarnessLevels()
      Deprecated. 
      A new means of getting active objects from a design is available. To get the active harness levels from a harness use: IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects(IXHarnessLevel, IXHarness). IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects will only return harness levels when in composite mode
      java.util.Set<IXOption> getApplicableOptions()
      List of applicable options in the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> getAssociatedMultiLocationComponents(IXObject location)
      List of all multi location component at a given location.
      java.util.Set<IXBreakoutTape> getBreakoutTapes()
      Get list of all breakout tapes applied on the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXBundle> getBundles()
      Get the bundles contained within this harness.
      java.util.Set<IXClip> getClips()
      Get all clips on the harness.
      IXConnectivity getConnectivity()
      Get the conectivity for the harness from which connectivity objects can be retrieved
      java.util.Set<IXConnector> getConnectors()
      Get the connectors associated with this harness.
      IXNode getDatumNode()
      Get the datum node from harness register associated with the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXGrommet> getGrommets()
      Get all grommets on the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
      Get the harness levels associated with this harness.
      IXHarnessRegister getHarnessRegister()
      Get the harness register associated with the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXInsulationRun> getInsulationRuns()
      Get all insulation runs associated with the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXMulticore> getMulticores()
      Get the multicores associated with this harness.
      java.util.Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> getMultiLocationComponents()
      Get the list of all multi location components of the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXNode> getNodes()
      Get list of all nodes in the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXOtherComponent> getOtherComponents()
      Get list of all other components associated with the harness.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
      Get the ring terminals associated with this harness.
      java.util.Set<IXSplice> getSplices()
      Get the splices associated with this harness.
      java.util.Set<IXSpotTape> getSpotTapes()
      Get list of all spot tapes applied on the harness.
      java.util.Set<IXWire> getWires()
      Get the wires associated with this harness.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnectivityObject

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

    • Method Detail

      • getHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
        Get the harness levels associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of harness levels associated with this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getActiveHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getActiveHarnessLevels()
        Deprecated. A new means of getting active objects from a design is available. To get the active harness levels from a harness use: IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects(IXHarnessLevel, IXHarness). IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects will only return harness levels when in composite mode
        Get the active harness levels associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of active harness levels associated with this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXIntegratorDesign.getActiveObjects(Class, IXHarness)

      • getBundles

        java.util.Set<IXBundle> getBundles()
        Get the bundles contained within this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of bundles owned by this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getConnectors

        java.util.Set<IXConnector> getConnectors()
        Get the connectors associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of connectors owned by this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getRingTerminals

        java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
        Get the ring terminals associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of ring terminals owned by this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getSplices

        java.util.Set<IXSplice> getSplices()
        Get the splices associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of splices owned by this harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getWires

        java.util.Set<IXWire> getWires()
        Get the wires associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of wires contained within the harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getMulticores

        java.util.Set<IXMulticore> getMulticores()
        Get the multicores associated with this harness.
        Returns:
        a Set of multicores contained within the harness if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getHarnessRegister

        IXHarnessRegister getHarnessRegister()
        Get the harness register associated with the harness.
        Returns:
        IXHarnessRegister The harness register associated with the harness

      • getDatumNode

        IXNode getDatumNode()
        Get the datum node from harness register associated with the harness.
        Returns:
        IXNode The datum node in harness register associated with the harness

      • getApplicableOptions

        java.util.Set<IXOption> getApplicableOptions()
        List of applicable options in the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXOption> Set of applicable options for the harness.

      • getInsulationRuns

        java.util.Set<IXInsulationRun> getInsulationRuns()
        Get all insulation runs associated with the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXInsulationRun> Set of all insulation runs associated with the harness.

      • getClips

        java.util.Set<IXClip> getClips()
        Get all clips on the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXClip> Set of all clips on the harness.

      • getGrommets

        java.util.Set<IXGrommet> getGrommets()
        Get all grommets on the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXGrommet> Set of all grommets on the harness.

      • getOtherComponents

        java.util.Set<IXOtherComponent> getOtherComponents()
        Get list of all other components associated with the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXOtherComponent> Set of associated other component with the harness.

      • getMultiLocationComponents

        java.util.Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> getMultiLocationComponents()
        Get the list of all multi location components of the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> Set of all multi location component of the harness.

      • getSpotTapes

        java.util.Set<IXSpotTape> getSpotTapes()
        Get list of all spot tapes applied on the harness.
        Returns:
        Set<IXSpotTape> Set of all spot tapes applied on the harness.

        java.util.Set<IXBreakoutTape> getBreakoutTapes()
        Get list of all breakout tapes applied on the harness.

        Set<IXBreakoutTape> Set of all breakout tapes applied on the harness.

      • getNodes

        java.util.Set<IXNode> getNodes()
        Get list of all nodes in the harness.

        Set<IXNode> Set of all nodes in the harness.

      • getAssociatedMultiLocationComponents

        java.util.Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> getAssociatedMultiLocationComponents(IXObject location)
        List of all multi location component at a given location.
        Parameters:
        location - Location at which multi location components will be selected.
        Returns:
        Set<IXMultiLocationComponent> Set of all multi location components at the given location.

      • getConnectivity

        IXConnectivity getConnectivity()
        Get the conectivity for the harness from which connectivity objects can be retrieved
        Returns:
        a connectivity for the harness.
